Landing.hero_badge: Manage finances. Track subscriptions. Save money.
Landing.hero_title: Master Your Finances & Subscriptions in One Place
Landing.hero_desc: Track your income, expenses, budgets, and subscriptions in one beautiful dashboard. Take ultimate control of your financial health.
Landing.free_plan_note: Free Plan: track up to 3 subscriptions • Upgrade to Pro for unlimited tracking & insights
Landing.features_title: Everything you need for total financial freedom
Landing.features_subtitle: Powerful tools to track every penny, wrapped in a beautiful interface
Landing.ready_desc: Join thousands of users who have simplified their money management with SubsRuby.
Landing.mini_title: Track your money. Grow your wealth.
Landing.mini_desc: Stop wondering where your money went. Set up your complete financial dashboard in 30 seconds.

Auth.check_email_desc: We sent a confirmation link to your inbox. Please click the link to activate your account. Don't forget to check your spam folder if you can't find it.

Features.f1_desc: Easily log your daily transactions. See exactly where your money goes with smart categorizations.
Features.f2_desc: Set monthly limits for categories like Food, Shopping, or Travel and never overspend again.
Features.f3_desc: Get notified before renewals. Live countdown timers show exactly when payments are due.
Features.f4_desc: Travel or subscribe globally? Track budgets and transactions in USD, EUR, TRY, and more.
Features.f5_desc: Visualize your cash flow and spending distribution with beautiful, easy-to-read charts.
Features.f6_desc: Your financial data is encrypted and protected. Only you can access your personal dashboard.

Setup.title: Setup Complete! 🎉
Setup.management_desc: You're managing your subscriptions well. We'll alert you if any costs increase.

Dashboard.track_free: Track up to {limit} subscriptions for free
Dashboard.unlock_pro: Unlock unlimited tracking, smart insights, and full financial control with Pro
Dashboard.limit_warning: You're almost at your free limit ({limit} subscriptions)
Dashboard.spending_moderate_desc: Consider reviewing your subscriptions to optimize your budget.
Dashboard.spending_change_desc: Track your subscriptions over time to see spending trends
Dashboard.find_hidden_savings: Review your subscriptions to find hidden savings

Modals.savings_desc: Detailed breakdown of your potential monthly and yearly savings.
Modals.upgrade_desc: Unlock unlimited tracking, smart insights, and full financial control.
Modals.budget_desc: Set a monthly spending limit for a specific category.
Modals.transaction_desc: Record a new income or expense to track your finances.

Finance.health_desc: Your subscriptions use {percent}% of your income.

Subscriptions.billed_on: You'll be billed on the {day} of each month
Subscriptions.select_plan_error: Please select a plan to continue
Subscriptions.url_helper: Leave empty to auto-generate a search link
Subscriptions.unused_info: These subscriptions are marked as unused. Cancelling them could significantly reduce your recurring expenses.
